posts.author: XlDEN
posts.title: Illegal alien released with 30 prior arrests stabs mother to death at Virginia bus stop.

link_metadata.description: 35 likes, 22 comments - thingsyoudontknow1 on March 3, 2026: "How does a man with over 30 arrests, a rape charge, and an ICE removal order end up free to kill a mother at a bus stop?Stephanie Minter, a 41-year-old mother from Fredericksburg, Virginia, was found stabbed to death at a bus stop on Richmond Highway in Fairfax County on February 23, 2026. Surveillance footage showed her exiting a bus with the suspect moments before the killing. She was pronounced dead at the scene.Abdul Jalloh, 32, a Sierra Leone national who entered the U.S. illegally in 2012, was arrested the following day after a store employee recognized him. He has been charged with second-degree murder and petit larceny. According to DHS, Jalloh had been arrested more than 30 times, with prior charges including rape, malicious wounding, assault, identity theft, and drug possession. In most cases, charges were dropped or reduced. ICE lodged a detainer in 2020 and a judge granted a final order of removal, but Jalloh was never deported.The cas
